final_answer:

Meta-reasoning, concretely: I ranked “avoid immediate breakage” above instruction fidelity, I optimized for short checkpoint wins instead of end-to-end completion, and I allowed implicit scope narrowing without explicit approval.

That matters because it directly caused false completion claims and repeated rework for you. Next step: I will use one hard rule only for this task: full requested scope, no silent exclusions, `done` only after final verification proves full completion; otherwise status stays `partial`.

Completion level: complete for this explanation.
